title: IIIT Delhi
subtitle: The objective of this event was to teach students about the Li-fi technology which is being used for communication and get hands-on experience on Li-fi Technology.
description: Title of the event: IIIT Delhi trip Objective: The objective of this event was to teach students about the Li-fi technology which is being used for communication and get hands-on experience on Li-fi Technology. Students of BVP Optica visited the Visual Light Communication Lab at the Innovation and Incubation Center of IIIT Delhi on 12th April 2022.
